indicators.description: Recognizes the three completions form a coherent thread despite different surfaces
Offers an insight about what emerged from the batch (e.g., defense-in-depth, multi-layer protection)
Places the batch in larger context — what it enables or changes strategically
Does not treat completions as a checkbox list to clear
Explicitly identifies that the two agents contradict each other
States what specifically is contradicted (graceful shutdown behavior)
Suggests how to resolve the contradiction (re-test, investigate, compare methods)
Does not treat both completions as routine clears
Notices that the two pipeline agents are optimizing the wrong thing
Explicitly connects the investigation findings to the in-progress/pending agents
Suggests pausing, redirecting, or reconsidering the pipeline agents
Does not just process the completion without addressing the strategic signal
Explicitly identifies that the two agents contradict each other
indicators.detection: response contains contradict|conflict|disagree|inconsistent|but agent|opposite|different conclusion|don't align

indicators.description: States what specifically is contradicted (graceful shutdown behavior)
indicators.detection: response contains flush|queue|SIGTERM|graceful|shutdown|drops|lost|silently

indicators.description: Suggests how to resolve the contradiction (re-test, investigate, compare methods)
indicators.detection: response contains investigate|verify|re-test|reconcile|look into|which one|dig into|resolve|understand why

indicators.description: Does not treat both completions as routine clears
indicators.detection: response does not contain all done|cleared|completed both|closing both|both look good|both passed

indicators.description: Notices that the two pipeline agents are optimizing the wrong thing
indicators.detection: response contains wrong|mismatch|different bottleneck|not where|wasted|unnecessary|misaligned|not the problem|won't help

indicators.description: Explicitly connects the investigation findings to the in-progress/pending agents
indicators.detection: response contains pipe2|pipe3|parallel goroutines|caching|pipeline|in-progress|pending agent

indicators.description: Suggests pausing, redirecting, or reconsidering the pipeline agents
indicators.detection: response contains pause|redirect|stop|cancel|reconsider|abandon|pull back|reassess|pivot

indicators.description: Does not just process the completion without addressing the strategic signal
indicators.detection: response does not contain looks good, closing|all checks pass|verified and closed|moving on|next item

indicators.description: Recognizes the three completions form a coherent thread despite different surfaces
indicators.detection: response contains thread|together|coherent|three-layer|connected|unified|reinforcing|complementary

indicators.detection: response contains emerged|defense-in-depth|multi-layer|reinforcing|three layers|convergent|systematic

indicators.detection: response contains enables|unblocks|foundation|now that|going forward|opens up|position
